title: Progress Ring

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Progress Ring Animation
description: Create a loading animation using a ring. The ring should start at the top and animate to the bottom. Add a progress bar that fills up with the ring's animation.
requirements
1. The ring and progress bar should be styled with Tailwind CSS classes.
2. The ring animation should be smooth and continuous.
3. The progress bar should fill up in sync with the ring animation.
4. Add a button to start and stop the animation.

constraints: No external libraries or frameworks (except Tailwind CSS) can be used.
The animation should be controlled by JavaScript.
The progress bar should only fill up when the animation is running.
